TOCFL Chinese Character Writer

Practice stroke order for 14425 Traditional Chinese characters

Traditional Chinese Character Writing Practice

This free tool helps you practice writing Traditional Chinese characters (繁體字) used in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and for the TOCFL exam. Each character is presented with animated stroke order, pinyin romanization, zhuyin (bopomofo) pronunciation, and English definition.

The vocabulary covers the full official TOCFL (Test of Chinese as a Foreign Language) word list across all levels: Basic (基礎), Intermediate (進階), and Advanced (精熟) — over 14,000 words in total.

Use the interactive quiz mode to practice writing characters by hand directly in your browser. Filter by TOCFL level to focus on the vocabulary you need. Ideal for students preparing for TOCFL, learners of Mandarin Chinese, or anyone wanting to master Traditional Chinese handwriting.

Keywords: traditional Chinese writing practice, stroke order, zhuyin, bopomofo, TOCFL vocabulary, 繁體字, learn to write Chinese characters, Chinese handwriting online
